title: VA CPRS Primary Care Progress Note Schema
description: Authoritative field definition for the VA CPRS Primary Care Progress Note template. Every field defined here has an exact 1:1 correspondence with a placeholder token in the CPRS_PCP_ProgressNote_Template.docx form.
validationNotes: All 75 fields are present in both this schema and the CPRS template.
Field keys use SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE and match <<FIELD_KEY>> tokens.
Enum fields accept only values listed in enumValues.
Boolean fields accept true or false only.
Checkbox-group fields are stored as arrays of selected option strings.
Free-text narrative fields preserve original formatting.
Fields marked required: true must be populated before the note is considered complete.
ICD-10 codes must match the pattern ^[A-Z][0-9]{2}(\.[0-9A-Z]{1,4})?$.

fields.label: Patient Name
fields.description: Full legal name of the veteran/patient.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Letters (including accented), spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, commas, periods.

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: Patient's date of birth.

fields.label: VA Patient ID
fields.description: Unique VA system patient identifier.

fields.label: SSN (Last 4)
fields.description: Last four digits of patient's Social Security Number.

fields.label: Date of Visit
fields.description: Date the clinical encounter occurred.

fields.label: Time
fields.description: Time the clinical encounter began.

fields.label: Attending Provider
fields.description: Name and credentials of the attending provider.

fields.label: Clinic / Location
fields.description: VA clinic or facility where the visit occurred.
fields.example: Primary Care Clinic 3B, VA Puget Sound HCS

fields.label: Resident / Student (if applicable)
fields.description: Name of the resident or student involved in the encounter.

fields.label: Supervising Provider
fields.description: Name of the supervising provider if a trainee was involved.

fields.label: Visit Type
fields.description: Modality of the clinical encounter.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Interpreter
fields.description: Whether an interpreter was used and the language.

fields.label: BP (mmHg)
fields.description: Blood pressure reading in systolic/diastolic format.

fields.label: Pulse (bpm)
fields.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

fields.label: Temp (°F)
fields.description: Body temperature in degrees Fahrenheit.

fields.label: SpO2 (%)
fields.description: Oxygen saturation percentage.

fields.label: Resp Rate
fields.description: Respiratory rate in breaths per minute.

fields.label: Weight (lbs)
fields.description: Patient weight in pounds.

fields.label: Height
fields.description: Patient height.

fields.label: BMI
fields.description: Body Mass Index.

fields.label: Pain Scale (0–10)
fields.description: Patient-reported pain level on a 0–10 numeric scale.

fields.label: Pain Location
fields.description: Anatomical location of reported pain.

fields.label: Chief Complaint / Reason for Visit
fields.description: Primary reason the patient is being seen today.
fields.example: Follow-up for hypertension management and chronic low back pain.

fields.label: History of Present Illness (HPI)
fields.description: Detailed narrative of the current illness or condition.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text narrative; may include line breaks.
fields.example: 62 y/o male veteran presents for routine follow-up of HTN and chronic LBP...

fields.label: Review of Systems (ROS)
fields.description: Pertinent positives and negatives across body systems.
fields.example: Constitutional: Denies fever, chills, weight loss. CV: Denies chest pain, palpitations...

fields.label: Medication Reconciliation
fields.description: Status of medication review during the encounter.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Medication Changes / Allergies Update
fields.description: Details of any medication changes or allergy updates.
fields.example: Increased lisinopril from 10mg to 20mg daily. NKDA confirmed.

fields.label: Social History Update
fields.description: Whether social history was updated during this visit.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Tobacco
fields.description: Patient's tobacco use status.

fields.label: Alcohol
fields.description: Patient's alcohol use status.

fields.label: Substances
fields.description: Patient's illicit substance use status.

fields.label: Exercise
fields.description: Patient's exercise/activity level.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Appearance
fields.description: Patient's general appearance during the encounter.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Behavior
fields.description: Patient's behavior during the encounter.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Eye Contact
fields.description: Quality of patient's eye contact during the encounter.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Speech
fields.description: Characteristics of patient's speech.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Mood (patient's words)
fields.description: Patient-reported mood in their own words.

fields.label: Affect
fields.description: Clinician-observed affect.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Thought Process
fields.description: Organization and quality of patient's thought process.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Thought Content
fields.description: Content of patient's thoughts including any abnormalities.

fields.label: Perceptions
fields.description: Any perceptual disturbances (hallucinations, etc.).

fields.label: Cognition
fields.description: Patient's cognitive status and orientation.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text: orientation level and any impairments.

fields.label: Insight
fields.description: Patient's level of insight into their condition.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Judgment
fields.description: Patient's level of judgment.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: MSE Narrative / Additional Observations
fields.description: Free-text narrative for additional MSE observations.
fields.example: Patient presents as mildly anxious but overall cooperative. No acute distress.

fields.label: Passive Ideation
fields.description: Whether patient reports passive suicidal ideation.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Active Ideation (no plan)
fields.description: Whether patient reports active suicidal ideation without a plan.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Active Ideation with Plan
fields.description: Whether patient reports active suicidal ideation with a specific plan.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Active Ideation with Intent
fields.description: Whether patient reports active suicidal ideation with intent. IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED if present.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Homicidal Ideation
fields.description: Whether patient reports homicidal ideation.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Self-harm (non-suicidal)
fields.description: Whether patient reports non-suicidal self-harm.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: SI/HI Details
fields.description: Detailed narrative if suicidal or homicidal ideation is present.

fields.label: Risk Factors
fields.description: Identified risk factors for the patient.

fields.label: Protective Factors
fields.description: Identified protective factors for the patient.
fields.example: Social support, Engaged in treatment, Religious beliefs

fields.label: Overall Risk Level
fields.description: Clinician's overall assessment of patient risk level.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Risk Assessment Narrative / Justification
fields.description: Clinician's narrative justification for the risk level determination.
fields.example: Veteran denies all SI/HI. No prior attempts. Strong family support. Low risk.

fields.label: Safety Plan
fields.description: Status of the patient's safety plan.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Crisis Line Provided
fields.description: Whether the Veterans Crisis Line was provided.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text: 'Yes — 988, Option 1', 'Already known to patient', or 'N/A'.

fields.label: General / Constitutional
fields.description: General appearance and constitutional findings.
fields.example: Well-nourished, well-developed male in no acute distress. Alert and oriented.

fields.label: Relevant System Exam Findings
fields.description: Findings from the relevant body system examinations.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text narrative; may include line breaks.
fields.example: CV: RRR, no murmurs/gallops/rubs. Lungs: CTA bilaterally. MSK: Lumbar paraspinal tenderness...

fields.label: Pertinent Lab / Imaging Results
fields.description: Relevant laboratory or imaging findings.

fields.label: ICD-10 Diagnosis Table
fields.description: Array of diagnoses with ICD-10 codes, status, and service-connection. Up to 5 entries.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Array of objects: { code, diagnosis, status, serviceConnected }.

fields.label: Clinical Assessment / Impression
fields.description: Clinician's overall clinical assessment and impression.
fields.example: 62 y/o male veteran with chronic HTN and LBP, currently stable on meds...

fields.label: Plan (by problem)
fields.description: Treatment plan organized by problem, including medications, referrals, orders, and education.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text narrative; may include line breaks.
fields.example:
1. HTN: Continue lisinopril 20mg daily. Recheck BP in 4 weeks.
2. LBP: Continue meloxicam PRN. Refer to PT.

fields.label: Follow-Up
fields.description: Scheduled follow-up interval.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Return Visit Instructions
fields.description: Instructions for the patient regarding their next visit.
fields.example: Return in 4 weeks for BP recheck. Bring home BP log. Call if BP >160/100.

fields.label: Referrals Placed
fields.description: Referrals generated during the encounter.

fields.label: Orders Entered
fields.description: Clinical orders placed during the encounter.

fields.label: Provider Signature
fields.description: Attestation signature of the provider.

fields.label: Date / Time Signed
fields.description: Date and time the note was signed.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Date-time string: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM or similar.

fields.label: Printed Name
fields.description: Printed full name of the signing provider.

fields.label: NPI
fields.description: National Provider Identifier number.

fields.label: Cosign / Supervisor (if applicable)
fields.description: Name of cosigning supervisor if a trainee authored the note.

fields.label: Cosign Date / Time
fields.description: Date and time supervisor cosigned.

fields.label: Note Status
fields.description: Current status of the clinical note.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.
